name: Quartzsea Acquisition Corp
business: Quartzsea Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no current operations and no revenue. Its sole business activity has been identifying and evaluating suitable acquisition transaction candidates.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We will have until 15 months from the closing of our initial public offering to consummate an initial business combination.
